subject: a desolate ravine landscape with floating rock formations and cascading water, viewed from above
description: A wide landscape shot looking down into a deep ravine or cataract. Massive dark rock formations rise and float at irregular angles, some draped in vegetation. Pale mist and cascading water — reduced to trickles — descend through the gaps. The color palette is predominantly grey, pale green, and white mist. The flavor text notes the water is nearly gone. No figures are present. The scene reads as a dry, decaying version of something once flowing and alive.
foreground: fractured floating rock formations, dry stone, sparse vegetation
background: mist, distant pale sky, cascading water remnants
